summary: Comprehensive testing of Carbon Premiums Dashboard and USSD API features. All backend APIs working correctly (16/16 tests passed). Frontend pages for Carbon Premiums Dashboard and USSD Simulator are functional. Homepage Hero section correctly displays EUDR/ICI badges.

ui_bugs.issue: React hydration warning: In HTML, <tr> cannot be a child of <span>. This is caused by dynamic rendering wrapper but doesn't affect functionality

critical_code_review_comments: Carbon Premiums API calculates premiums correctly: Prime = Surface × 50000 FCFA/ha × (Score/10), with +20% bonus for score >= 8
USSD API correctly identifies farmer by phone and shows personalized menu with real data (parcels, payments, scores)
Payment flow creates record in DB and triggers SMS (MOCKED - Orange Money integration simulated)
CSV export generates proper semicolon-delimited file with French headers

success_rate.frontend: 100% (All pages render correctly, all buttons functional)

seed_data_creation: None - used existing seed data from previous iterations
context_for_next_testing_agent: Carbon Premiums Dashboard: 5 eligible members with 745,100 FCFA total premium. Bamba Fatou has received 2 payments of 221,400 FCFA each. USSD API working with all 6 menu options. Payment flow MOCKED (Orange Money + SMS). Homepage Hero shows EUDR/ICI badges correctly.

features_verified.Carbon Premiums Members API: PASS - Returns members with calculated premiums
features_verified.Carbon Premiums CSV Export: PASS - Generates CSV with proper French headers
features_verified.Carbon Premiums Payment: PASS - Creates payment record (MOCKED Orange Money)
features_verified.Carbon Premiums History: PASS - Returns payment history with references
features_verified.USSD Test Endpoint: PASS - Returns personalized menu for phone number
features_verified.USSD Callback Options 1-6: PASS - All menu options navigate correctly
features_verified.Homepage Hero Section: PASS - Shows EUDR/ICI badges and 50000 FCFA/ha rate
features_verified.Carbon Premiums Dashboard UI: PASS - All elements present (tabs, cards, table, buttons)

mocked_apis_confirmed: Orange Money payment - status set to 'completed' without real API call
SMS Service - stored in DB but not sent to real phone (Orange SMS API not configured)
